```kotlin Android
fun mentionInComment() {
        // Build mention metadata for content
        val mentionMetadata = com.amityco.socialcloud.sdk.model.AmityMentionMetadata.User(
            userId = "userId", displayName = "User Name", index = 0, length = 9
        )
        AmitySocialClient.newCommentRepository()
            .createComment()
            .post(postId = "postId")
            .with()
            .text("Hello @UserName")
            .mentionUsers(listOf(mentionMetadata))
            .build()
            .comment()
            .subscribe()
    }
```

```swift iOS
let commentRepository = AmityCommentRepository(client: AmityUIKitManagerInternal.shared.client)
        let referenceId = "post123"
        let mentionees: [AmityMentioneesBuilder] = [AmityMentioneesBuilder().setUserIds(["user1"])]
        let metadata: [String: Any] = ["mentioned": [["type": "user", "userId": "user1", "index": 0, "length": 5]]]
        let builder = AmityCommentCreationDataBuilder()
        builder.setText("@user1 Great post!")
        builder.setReferenceId(referenceId)
        builder.setReferenceType(.post)
        commentRepository.createComment(builder, mentionees: mentionees, metadata: metadata) { comment, error in
            print("Comment with mention created: \(comment?.commentId ?? "")")
        }
```

fun mentionInMessage() {
        // Build mention metadata for content
        val mentionMetadata = com.amityco.socialcloud.sdk.model.AmityMentionMetadata.User(
            userId = "userId",
            displayName = "User Name",
            index = 0,
            length = 9
        )
        AmityChatClient.newMessageRepository()
            .createMessage(channelId = "channelId")
            .with()
            .text("Hello @UserName")
            .mentionUsers(listOf(mentionMetadata))
            .build()
            .send()
            .subscribe()
    }
```

```swift iOS
let messageRepository = AmityMessageRepository(client: AmityUIKitManagerInternal.shared.client)
        let subChannelId = "subChannel123"
        let mentionees: [AmityMentioneesBuilder] = [AmityMentioneesBuilder().setUserIds(["user1", "user2"])]
        let metadata: [String: Any] = ["mentioned": [["type": "user", "userId": "user1", "index": 0, "length": 5]]]
        let textData = AmityTextMessageCreationData(text: "@user1 Hello!", subChannelId: subChannelId)
        messageRepository.createTextMessage(data: textData, mentionees: mentionees, metadata: metadata) { message, error in
            print("Message with mention created: \(message?.messageId ?? "")")
        }
```

fun userMentionInPost() {
        val communityId = "communityId"
        val mentionedUserId = "userId"
        AmitySocialClient.newPostRepository()
            .createPost()
            .targetCommunity(communityId)
            .text("Hello @user!")
            .mentionUsers(listOf(mentionedUserId))
            .build()
            .post()
            .subscribe()
    }
```

```kotlin Android
fun createTextPostWithMention(
        postRepository: AmityPostRepository,
        post: AmityPost,
        image: AmityImage
    ) {
        //create AmityMentionMetadata from userId1, startIndex and length
        val userId1 = "userId1"
        val startMentionIndex1 = 0
        val mentionLength1 = 7
        //construct user1's AmityMentionMetadata to JsonObject using AmityMentionMetadataCreator
        val mentionMetadata1: AmityMentionMetadata.USER =
            AmityMentionMetadata.USER(userId1, startMentionIndex1, mentionLength1)
        //create AmityMentionMetadata from userId2, startIndex and length
        val userId2 = "userId2"
        val startMentionIndex2 = 17
        val mentionLength2 = 7
        //construct user2's AmityMentionMetadata to JsonObject using AmityMentionMetadataCreator
        val mentionMetadata2: AmityMentionMetadata.USER =
            AmityMentionMetadata.USER(userId2, startMentionIndex2, mentionLength2)
        //construct AmityMentionMetadata of user1 and user2 to JsonObject using AmityMentionMetadataCreator
        val mentionMetadataCreator: JsonObject =
            AmityMentionMetadataCreator(listOf(mentionMetadata1, mentionMetadata2)).create()

        val attachments = listOf<AmityAttachment>(image)
        //update text post with mention
        val postData: AmityPost.Data = post.getData()
        if (postData is AmityPost.Data.TEXT) {
            postRepository.editPost(post.getPostId())
                .text(text = "@userOne say hi! @userTwo")
                .metadata(metadata = mentionMetadataCreator)
                .mentionUsers(userIds = listOf(userId1, userId2))
                .attachments(*attachments.toTypedArray())
                .build()
                .apply()

    }

```kotlin Android
fun createPollPost() {
        AmitySocialClient.newPollRepository()
            .createPoll("Favourite framework?")
            .answers(listOf(
                com.amityco.socialcloud.sdk.api.social.poll.AmityPollAnswer.Text("Compose"),
                com.amityco.socialcloud.sdk.api.social.poll.AmityPollAnswer.Text("XML")
            ))
            .timeToClosePoll(86400)
            .build()
            .create()
            .flatMap { poll ->
                AmitySocialClient.newPostRepository()
                    .createPost()
                    .targetUser("userId")
                    .poll(poll.getPollId())
                    .text("Vote now!")
                    .build()
                    .post()
            }
            .subscribeOn(io.reactivex.rxjava3.schedulers.Schedulers.io())
            .observeOn(AndroidSchedulers.mainThread())
            .subscribe({ post -> }, { error -> error.printStackTrace() })
    }
```
